description: Full-viewport animated background (gradient/particles), floating glassmorphism auth card centered.

css_layout_rules..layout-login-v3: min-height: 100vh; position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
css_layout_rules..auth-floating: position: relative; z-index: 10; width: 100%; max-width: 400px; border-radius: 1.5rem; padding: 2.5rem; backdrop-filter: blur(24px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px);
css_layout_rules..auth-tabs: display: flex; border-radius: 0.75rem; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
